---
title: "Necrodegradomics"
description: "Reproducible analysis of proteome alterations in human autopsy tissues in relation to time after death."
---

Necrodegradomics contains code and reproducible reports for analysis of protein abundance in autopsied tissue and its association with time after death.

The analysis identified proteins with apparent increased or decreased abundance across degradation time in kidney, liver, and lung tissues, using linear models implemented with `limma`.

## Highlights

- Tissue proteomics in human autopsy samples.
- Analysis of protein abundance behavior over degradation time.
- Reproducible reporting and visualization.
- Related to the 2023 *Cellular and Molecular Life Sciences* publication.

## Links

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/MiguelCos/Necrodegradomics)
- [Publication DOI](https://doi.org/10.1007/s00018-023-04754-3)

:::{.tags}
[`tissue proteomics`]{.tag} [`limma`]{.tag} [`sample quality`]{.tag}
:::
